sentences.target: Je suis de bonne humeur aujourd'hui.

translations.fr: Je suis de bonne humeur aujourd'hui.
translations.en: I'm in a good mood today.
translations.vi: Hôm nay tâm trạng tôi tốt.
translations.nl: Ik ben vandaag in een goede stemming.
translations.nb: Jeg er i godt humør i dag.
translations.id: Hari ini aku sedang dalam suasana hati yang baik.
translations.sv: Jag är på gott humör idag.
translations.da: Jeg er i godt humør i dag.
translations.ja: 今日は機嫌がいいです。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 1st person singular; grammatical subject of the copula.
Present indicative, 1st person singular of 'être'; used as a copula linking the subject to the predicative complement.
Preposition introducing the noun phrase 'bonne humeur'; part of the idiomatic predicative construction 'être de (bonne/mauvaise) humeur'.
Adjective, feminine singular; modifies 'humeur' and agrees in gender and number with it.
Common noun, feminine; head of the noun phrase 'bonne humeur' functioning as a predicative complement.
Temporal adverb modifying the clause, indicating the time frame.

sentences.target: Tu es de mauvaise humeur ce matin.
sentences.reading: /ty ɛ də movɛz ymœʁ sə matɛ̃/

translations.fr: Tu es de mauvaise humeur ce matin.
translations.ipa: /ty ɛ də movɛz ymœʁ sə matɛ̃/
translations.en: You're in a bad mood this morning.
translations.es: Esta mañana estás de mal humor.
translations.de: Du bist heute Morgen schlecht gelaunt.
translations.ru: Ты сегодня утром в плохом настроении.
translations.pt: Você está de mau humor esta manhã.
translations.vi: Sáng nay tâm trạng bạn không tốt.
translations.uk: Ти сьогодні вранці в поганому настрої.
translations.hi: आज सुबह तुम्हारा मूड खराब है।
translations.pl: Dziś rano jesteś w złym nastroju.
translations.el: Σήμερα το πρωί είσαι σε κακή διάθεση.
translations.nb: I dag tidlig er du i dårlig humør.
translations.id: Pagi ini suasana hati kamu buruk.
translations.sv: Du är på dåligt humör i dag på morgonen.
translations.ro: Ești prost dispus în această dimineață.
translations.da: Du er i dårligt humør her til morgen.
translations.ja: 今朝は機嫌が悪いです。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 2nd person singular; subject of the copula.
Present indicative, 2nd person singular of 'être'; used as a copula linking the subject to the predicative complement.
Preposition introducing the noun phrase 'mauvaise humeur'; part of the idiomatic predicative construction.
Adjective, feminine singular; modifies 'humeur' and agrees in gender and number.
Common noun, feminine; head of the noun phrase 'mauvaise humeur' functioning as a predicative complement.
Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular; modifies 'matin' to form a temporal NP.
Common noun, masculine; head of 'ce matin', a temporal adjunct modifying the clause.

translations.en: His or her mood changes quickly.
translations.es: Su estado de ánimo cambia rápido.
translations.zh-Hans: 他或她的情绪变化很快。
translations.ru: Его или её настроение быстро меняется.
translations.pt: O humor dele ou dela muda rápido.
translations.he: מצב הרוח שלו או שלה משתנה מהר.
translations.vi: Tâm trạng của người đó thay đổi nhanh.
translations.nl: Zijn of haar humeur verandert snel.
translations.uk: Його чи її настрій швидко змінюється.
translations.hi: उसका मूड जल्दी बदल जाता है।
translations.pl: Jego lub jej nastrój szybko się zmienia.
translations.el: Η διάθεσή του ή της αλλάζει γρήγορα.
translations.nb: Humøret hans eller hennes endrer seg raskt.
translations.sv: Hans eller hennes humör förändras snabbt.
translations.ro: Starea lui sau a ei se schimbă repede.
translations.cs: Jeho nebo její nálada se rychle mění.
translations.da: Hans eller hendes humør ændrer sig hurtigt.
translations.ja: 彼または彼女の機嫌はすぐに変わります。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner, 3rd person singular; used before a vowel-initial noun (here feminine 'humeur'), indicating the possessor.
Common noun, feminine; head of the subject NP 'Son humeur'.
Present indicative, 3rd person singular; main lexical verb, predicate of the clause.
Adverb modifying 'change', expressing manner.

sentences.target: On parle de mon humeur au travail.

translations.fr: On parle de mon humeur au travail.
translations.en: We talk about my mood at work.
translations.es: Hablamos de mi estado de ánimo en el trabajo.
translations.de: Wir sprechen bei der Arbeit über meine Stimmung.
translations.it: Parliamo del mio umore al lavoro.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在工作中谈论我的心情。
translations.yue: 喺公司我哋討論我嘅心情。
translations.ru: Мы на работе говорим о моём настроении.
translations.pt: Falamos sobre o meu humor no trabalho.
translations.he: אנחנו מדברים על מצב הרוח שלי בעבודה.
translations.tr: İş yerinde benim ruh halim hakkında konuşuyoruz.
translations.vi: Ở chỗ làm, chúng tôi nói về tâm trạng của tôi.
translations.ar: نحن نتحدث عن مزاجي في العمل.
translations.nl: We praten op het werk over mijn humeur.
translations.uk: На роботі ми говоримо про мій настрій.
translations.hi: हम काम पर मेरे मूड के बारे में बात करते हैं।
translations.pl: W pracy rozmawiamy o moim nastroju.
translations.el: Στη δουλειά μιλάμε για τη διάθεσή μου.
translations.nb: På jobb snakker vi om humøret mitt.
translations.id: Di tempat kerja kami membicarakan suasana hati saya.
translations.sv: På jobbet pratar vi om mitt humör.
translations.ro: La muncă vorbim despre dispoziția mea.
translations.cs: V práci mluvíme o mé náladě.
translations.da: På arbejdet taler vi om mit humør.
translations.ja: 職場で私の機嫌について話します。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite subject pronoun; colloquially used for 'we'; grammatical subject of the verb.
Present indicative, 3rd person singular; main verb. Intransitive with the prepositional complement 'de N' (topic).
Preposition introducing the topic/object of speech: 'mon humeur'.
Possessive determiner, 1st person singular; used before a vowel-initial noun (feminine 'humeur').
Common noun, feminine; object of the preposition 'de'.
Contraction of 'à' + 'le'; introduces the prepositional phrase 'au travail' (locative/context).
Common noun, masculine; head of the PP 'au travail', indicating location/context.
